title: Gray Forest Mod
description: This mod adds new biome to the game - Gray Forest
body:
### If you want to have features from this mod on your server, it must be installed on both client and server!
# GRAY FOREST
stop telling me that correct is gr**E**y. I KNOW IT, BUT MOD'S NAME IS **GRAY** FOREST
![Gray Forest Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed53351db05ad9aaee3ce8eaf5472c12acb2825c_0.webp)
This mod adds new biome to the game - **Gray Forest**. It will be updated with other stuff like _blocks_. This mod also adds **Obsidian instruments**.

This Mod also gives you design blocks that you can use in your buildings. This mod adds a new **structure**: gray house

### Currently added blocks:
- Gray Stairs
- Gray Fruit
- Gray Planks
- Gray Log
- Gray Leaves
- Gray Slab
- Gray Door
- Gray TrapDoor
- Gray Door with glass
- Gray TrapDoor with glass

![Gray Forest Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb6fc8ca80f12d01dc4595d6bbff71f404842d78_0.webp)

### FEEL FREE TO DM ME IN DISCORD OR TELEGRAM IF YOU WANT SOME NEW STUFF IN THE MOD! [My Telegram](https://t.me/TheMakrin) Discord - @themakrin
